## What changed

Describe the change and motivation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or `docs/`)
- [ ] Lint passes locally
- [ ] Breaking changes documented

## Validation

Commands used locally:

```bash
poetry run pytest -q
poetry run ruff check .
```

## Breaking changes

If applicable, describe migration steps for users.
